name: Safety and Efficacy of Klotho and Follistatin Gene Therapy
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov registry for a recruiting early phase 1 Minicircle study of injectable nonviral plasmid-delivered klotho and follistatin gene therapy in healthy adults aged 50 to 80 years, with serum klotho/follistatin, adverse-event, quality-of-life, cognitive, epigenetic-age, physical-performance, inflammatory, phosphate-axis, renal, and safety-lab endpoints and no posted results in the June 4, 2026 API view.
